'''Duefgrin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] teenage [[Brolf]] living on [[Barlok/Legends|Barlok]] who was part of the assassination plot against several negotiators in a [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] and Brolfi government mining dispute. Some of the negotiators included [[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente]], [[Guild Master/Legends|Guildmaster]] [[Gilfrome]] and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Jorus C'baoth]].<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

Duefgrin stole a pair of [[burst thrusters]] to be used in the building of a homemade [[Missile/Legends|missile]] to be targeted, under the leadership of [[Filvian (Brolf)|Filvian]] (working under the direction of [[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]]), against the Barlok negotiators. He passed the thrusters to fellow Brolf conspirator [[Jhompfi]], who, in turn, passed them off to [[Migress]].<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

Other items the young Brolfi conspirators collected for the missile construct were [[Explosive charge/Legends|explosives]], a stabilization system, and alloy packing cylinders.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

Duefgrin wore a red vest with many pockets, in which he carried most of his possessions, and was a mechanical enthusiast who habitually stole what he needed for his projects.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

==Appearances==
